PortfolioData.title: PortfolioData
PortfolioData.description: Portfolio data configuration including projects, style categories, addons, form fields, and discounts

StoreData.title: StoreData
StoreData.description: Store data configuration including products, courses, product categories, pages, and coupons

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A student discussion comment or Q&A on a product or course

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile with login and purchase access metadata

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.description: Analytics counts for impressions, views, unique viewers, and revisits per product/course

/portfolio/{docId}.description: Contains portfolio and core configuration under the 'data' document

/store/{docId}.description: Contains digital products, academy courses, and pages config under the 'data' document

/comments/{commentId}.description: User feedback, discussions, and course support queries

/users/{userId}.description: Site user profile with details of digital goods and courses they have been granted licensing to

/analytics/{itemId}.description: Visitor metrics per specific catalog listing item
